prompt_text: Vercel vs AWS Amplify pricing and features
response:
# Vercel vs AWS Amplify: Pricing & Features

## Pricing Comparison

| Feature | Vercel | AWS Amplify |
|---------|--------|------------|
| **Free Tier** | Generous (Hobby) | Limited free tier |
| **Hosting** | $20+/month (Pro) | Pay-as-you-go |
| **Serverless Functions** | Included | Additional charges |
| **Database** | Vercel Postgres add-on | DynamoDB/RDS (separate) |
| **Cost for Scale** | Predictable, tiered | Can be cheaper at high volume |

### Detailed Breakdown

**Vercel Pricing:**
- **Hobby (Free)**: Limited, great for learning
- **Pro ($20/month)**: 100GB bandwidth, serverless functions
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing
- **Overage costs**: $0.50/GB bandwidth, $0.50 per 100k function invocations

**AWS Amplify Pricing:**
- **Hosting**: ~$0.15/GB data transfer, $0.02/build minutes
- **Functions**: Lambda pricing (~$0.20 per 1M requests)
- **Database**: Separate service costs (DynamoDB, RDS)
- **No free tier bandwidth** (minimal monthly cost possible)

---

## Features Comparison

### Deployment & Hosting

| Feature | Vercel | AWS Amplify |
|---------|--------|------------|
| Git Integration | GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket | AWS CodeCommit, GitHub, etc. |
| Preview Deploys | Excellent | Good |
| Rollbacks | One-click | Manual |
| Performance | Global edge network | CloudFront CDN |
| **Winner** | Vercel ✅ | AWS |

### Backend Capabilities

| Feature | Vercel | AWS Amplify |
|---------|--------|------------|
| Serverless Functions | Edge & Serverless | Lambda |
| Database | Postgres, MySQL | DynamoDB, RDS, Aurora |
| Authentication | Auth0 integration | Cognito (built-in) |
| API | API Routes | AppSync, REST API |
| File Storage | Blob Storage | S3 |
| **Winner** | AWS (more options) | AWS ✅ |

### Developer Experience

| Feature | Vercel | AWS Amplify |
|---------|--------|------------|
| Setup Time | Minutes | Hours |
| Learning Curve | Very easy | Moderate to steep |
| Documentation | Excellent | Good (can be overwhelming) |
| CLI Tools | Simple | Powerful but complex |
| **Winner** | Vercel ✅ | AWS |

---

## Best For

### Choose **Vercel** if you:
- ✅ Build Next.js, React, or frontend-focused apps
- ✅ Want fast deployment with minimal configuration
- ✅ Prefer predictable costs with low usage
- ✅ Need excellent performance out-of-box
- ✅ Are an indie hacker or small startup
- ✅ Value developer experience

### Choose **AWS Amplify** if you:
- ✅ Build full-stack enterprise applications
- ✅ Need advanced backend services (Cognito, DynamoDB, etc.)
- ✅ Have high traffic and benefit from pay-as-you-go
- ✅ Integrate heavily with AWS ecosystem
- ✅ Need compliance/enterprise features
- ✅ Want maximum flexibility

---

## Real-World Cost Examples

### Scenario: Small SaaS (~10k monthly users)
- **Vercel**: ~$20-50/month (Pro plan + minimal overages)
- **AWS Amplify**: ~$30-80/month (hosting + Lambda + storage)

### Scenario: Growing App (~100k monthly users)
- **Vercel**: ~$100-200/month (Pro + significant overages)
- **AWS Amplify**: ~$100-300/month (better scaling potential)

### Scenario: Large Application (~1M+ monthly users)
- **Vercel**: ~$500+/month (or Enterprise contract)
- **AWS Amplify**: ~$800-2000/month (but more features/capacity)

---

## Verdict

| Priority | Winner |
|----------|-----
